SELECT toYYYYMM(event_date) + 1 as incremented_month FROM test_dates;
SELECT toYYYYMM(event_date) as year_month FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > now() - INTERVAL 1 YEAR;
SELECT DISTINCT toYYYYMM(event_date) FROM test_dates ORDER BY toYYYYMM(event_date);
SELECT a.event_date, toYYYYMM(a.event_date) FROM test_dates a JOIN test_dates b ON a.event_date > b.event_date;
SELECT toYYYYMM(toDateTime('2021-10-05 10:15:00', 'Europe/Berlin')) as berlin_time, toYYYYMM(toDateTime('2021-10-05 10:15:00', 'US/Eastern')) as eastern_time;
SELECT toYYYYMM(event_date) AS year_month, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY year_month;
WITH (SELECT max(event_date) FROM test_dates) AS latest_date SELECT toYYYYMM(latest_date) AS latest_month;
SELECT toYYYYMM(DATE_ADD(event_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) FROM test_dates;
SELECT CASE WHEN toYYYYMM(event_date) < 202301 THEN 'Old' ELSE 'Recent' END AS period FROM test_dates;
SELECT toYYYYMM(toDate(value)) FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([toDate('2022-01-01'), toDate('2022-02-01')]) AS value);
SELECT toYYYYMM(toDate('2021-01-01')) AS valid_date, toYYYYMM(toDate('2021-15-01')) AS invalid_date;
